name: Commit Message Reminder
description: Reminds about Conventional Commits format when starting a commit

then.prompt:
Provide a quick reminder about Conventional Commits format:

Format: <type>(<scope>): <subject>

Types:
- feat: New feature
- fix: Bug fix  
- docs: Documentation
- style: Formatting
- refactor: Code restructure
- perf: Performance
- test: Tests
- build: Build system
- ci: CI/CD
- chore: Maintenance

Examples:
- feat(agent): add search tool
- fix(rag): resolve memory leak
- docs: update setup guide

Rules:
✓ Type lowercase
✓ Present tense (add, not added)
✓ No period at end
✓ Keep under 50 chars
